sections.text: Summarize the incident for the weekly report: what broke, customer impact, and the fix.

09:02 deploy 2026-28 rolled out to the eu-west pool. 09:07 error rate on /v1/export rose from 0.2% to 14%. 09:11 pager fired for the export queue depth. 09:15 rollback initiated by the on-call. 09:19 error rate back to baseline. 09:40 root cause identified: the new serializer dropped the legacy date format still sent by v1 clients. 10:05 fix merged behind a compatibility flag. 10:30 canary redeploy clean. 11:00 flag enabled for all pools.
Roughly 4% of export jobs failed for 17 minutes; all failed jobs were retried automatically and completed by 09:26. No data loss.
Ticket 4812: exports stuck, unblocked after retry. Ticket 4815: dashboard showed stale numbers for ~20 minutes. Ticket 4816: asked whether scheduled exports were affected (they were not).
Draft notes: add a contract test for the legacy date format, alert on serializer error ratio per route, consider a slower rollout for the export service.
